prd.title: Writing index — typographic editorial redesign
prd.overview:
Covers Freya Work Order WO-003. A full redesign of the Writing index (/writing) from a collapsible accordion list into a typographic editorial index — a serious archive's table of contents. Each essay becomes one row: serif title (left), a dotted hairline leader, and the mono quarter (right). The three argued sections (On Leadership / On Experience Design / On AI) become always-open with big quiet § numerals; all accordion/collapse/section-focus machinery is removed. On hover or keyboard focus a row's title turns signature red and its deck reveals beneath (no layout shift). The search filter is simplified to a quiet type-to-filter (count + clear, per-section empty states).
This PRD also carries one small site-wide change: the owner promoted red-on-hover to the standard link/title hover convention (visual-direction.md updated), so the home page's title hovers move from tertiary grey to signature red to match /writing.
No backend work — static Astro site, one file rewritten (src/pages/writing/index.astro) plus a surgical hover-colour edit on src/pages/index.astro. The essays data file (src/data/essays.js) and the masthead voice are explicitly out of scope and must not change. The featured-essay pull on /writing is left exactly as built (owner directive).

scope.views: Writing index (/writing) — full redesign; Home (/) — hover-colour only
scope.platform: None. Static site. Reads existing src/data/essays.js; no data, API, or DB work.

requirement.title: Editorial index structure — leader-dots rows + always-open sections
requirement.description: Rewrite the body of src/pages/writing/index.astro so each essay renders as a single table-of-contents row: an <a> to /writing/<slug> containing the serif title (rendered with set:html to preserve the <em> clause, --ink at rest), a flexible dotted hairline leader in --rule (decorative, aria-hidden/pure-CSS, never real text), and the mono quarter right-aligned (--tertiary, e.g. "Q4 2014"). Render the three sections from essaySections + essays (already grouped, newest-first within each) as ALWAYS-OPEN: each with a big quiet § numeral in the gutter (§ 01/02/03), the <h2> title, the existing descriptor, and a --rule hairline. Remove the <button class="section-toggle">, aria-expanded, the toggle glyph, and the .collapsed / .section-collapsed-msg / "Hidden. Click to expand." machinery entirely. Per-row deck text is rendered but hidden at rest (revealed in REQ-002); mirror plain title + deck onto data-title / data-deck via plainTitle() for the filter. Keep the masthead (eyebrow, H1, intro) and the /about pivot; keep the featured pull EXACTLY as built.

acceptance.criterion: Each of the 23 essays renders as one row: serif title (left) · dotted --rule leader · mono quarter (right).
The dotted leader is decorative only — not selectable text, not exposed to assistive tech, not matched by the filter.
Three always-open sections render with § 01/02/03 gutter numerals, their titles, and descriptors: On Leadership (10), On Experience Design (11), On AI (2).
No toggle <button>, aria-expanded attribute, toggle glyph, or .collapsed/"Hidden, click to expand" element exists anywhere in the rendered DOM.

The featured-essay pull markup is byte-for-byte the same as before this PRD (3px --signature left border, red eyebrow, deck, excerpt, CTA). [Its hide-on-filter behavior was later removed per REQ-007 — markup/visual unchanged.]
The H1 "Writing, arranged by what it argues." and the intro ending "Quarterly. Long-form. No newsletter to sign up for." are present verbatim.
npm run build passes; counts derive from essays.js (eyebrow shows the real total).

requirement.title: Row hover/focus — red title + deck reveal (no reflow)
requirement.description: On hover AND :focus-visible of a row, shift the title colour --ink → --signature (colour only — no weight/style/position change, no WONK lean) and reveal the essay's deck (quiet serif italic) beneath the title. Use a 150ms (--t-fast) colour transition. Prevent layout shift by reserving the deck's vertical space at rest (deck rendered, opacity:0, fading to 1 on hover/focus). Under prefers-reduced-motion: reduce, swap opacity instantly (no fade). Keyboard parity is mandatory: focus produces the identical red+deck state plus the standard 2px --signature focus ring. The /about pivot hover also moves to --signature (was tertiary).

acceptance.criterion: Hovering a row turns its title --signature red (colour only) and shows its deck; both revert on mouse-out.
Hovering a mid-list row causes NO vertical movement of the rows below it (space reserved).
Tabbing to a row by keyboard shows the identical red-title + deck-revealed state plus a 2px --signature focus ring; every row is reachable in DOM order.
With prefers-reduced-motion: reduce, the colour/deck change is instant (no fade); no movement.
The /about pivot link hovers to --signature red, not tertiary.
Hover red works correctly in both light and dark mode.

requirement.title: Simplified filter — count + clear, per-section empty states
requirement.description: Keep a quiet type-to-filter; strip the section-focus machinery. Match the trimmed, lowercased query against each row's data-title + data-deck; set hidden on non-matching rows; empty query shows all rows. The result line (aria-live="polite") shows count + clear ONLY — e.g. "— 4 essays · Clear —" — with no "X shown", no "Section:" fragment, no multi-part status string. When a section has zero matches under the query, show a quiet italic "— No matches in {section title}. —" in place of its rows while still rendering its head + § numeral. [SUPERSEDED by REQ-007: the featured pull now stays visible while filtering — the body.is-filtered hide behavior was removed.] Remove state.activeSection, the .collapsed toggling, the .section-toggle click handlers, and the "Clear all" multi-part hint.

acceptance.criterion: Typing filters rows live: non-matching rows are hidden; clearing restores all rows, the featured pull, and focus to the input.
The result line shows only a count + clear control (e.g. "— 4 essays · Clear —"); no "Section:" or "X shown" text appears.
A query matching nothing in one section shows "— No matches in {title}. —" under that section's still-visible head; other sections show their matches.
A query matching nothing site-wide shows the empty message in all three sections and "— 0 essays · Clear —".
No section-focus, collapse, or activeSection code path remains in the page script.

requirement.title: Responsive ≤880px — rows stack, leader dots drop
requirement.description: At ≤880px: collapse the --gutter-mark column and move § numerals inline above each section title; stack rows so the title takes full width and the quarter moves below the title (mono, left-aligned); drop the dotted leader (or render a single short hairline) since the quarter is no longer right-aligned on the same baseline; make the filter input full-width and left-align the result line.

acceptance.criterion: At 375px wide there is no horizontal scroll and no overlap; rows are stacked with the quarter beneath the title.
The leader dots are not rendered as a spanning element on stacked phone rows.
§ numerals remain visible (inline) and the filter input is full-width.
Hover/focus reveal (REQ-002) still works where a pointer/keyboard is available at small widths.

requirement.title: Site-wide hover convention — home page titles hover red
requirement.description: Apply the new site-wide interaction-red convention to src/pages/index.astro: the home page's title hovers currently go to --tertiary; change them to --signature so the home page matches /writing. Specifically the case-card title hover (.case:hover .title) and the recent-essay title hover (.essay:hover .title), plus any other link/title hover currently resolving to --tertiary. Surgical — hover COLOUR only. Do not touch the fold, the §06 red-bleed block, layout, or copy.

acceptance.criterion: On the home page, hovering a case-card title and a recent-essay title turns the title --signature red (not tertiary).
No other home-page change: fold, red-bleed, layout, and copy are untouched (diff is hover-colour declarations only).
Home page still builds and renders identically except for hover colour; works in light and dark mode.

requirement.title: View toggle — Topic / Date arrangement + controls band
requirement.description: Add a Topic/Date view toggle and relocate the controls. (1) Move the filter OUT of the masthead into a new controls band that sits between the featured pull and the list; the band holds the view toggle (left) and the filter (right), with the result line beneath. (2) The toggle is quiet mono — "— Arrange — Topic | Date" — two buttons with aria-pressed, active state ink + underline, NO red (administrative chrome; inactive grey). (3) Render BOTH arrangements server-side: #view-topic (the existing three § sections) and #view-date (one flat list from essaysNewestFirst, no sections, each row carrying a topic tag in its meta cluster as "TOPIC · QUARTER", tag derived from essaySections minus the "On " prefix). The toggle swaps which view is visible via a data-view attribute. (4) The choice is persisted in localStorage (key uxward:writing-view) and restored on load; default Topic. (5) The filter operates on the visible view: per-section empty messages in Topic, a single "— No matches. —" in Date; an active query persists across a toggle. The H1 stays static in both modes. The featured pull shows in both modes and still hides while filtering. View swap is instant (no animation). essays.js is not modified.

acceptance.criterion: The filter no longer sits in the masthead; it and the view toggle live in a controls band between the featured pull and the first row, toggle left / filter right.
Toggle shows two options Topic|Date in mono; the active one is ink + underline, the inactive grey; neither is red; both are keyboard-operable with aria-pressed reflecting state.
Topic view renders the three § sections (unchanged). Date view renders one flat list, newest→oldest, with NO § sections and each row showing "TOPIC · QUARTER" (e.g. "EXPERIENCE DESIGN · Q2 2021").
Clicking Date then reloading the page returns to Date (persisted in localStorage); clearing storage / first visit shows Topic.
Filtering works in whichever view is active: Topic shows per-section empty messages, Date shows a single "— No matches. —"; the count+clear line is identical; featured hides while filtering in both.
The H1 "Writing, arranged by what it argues." is unchanged in both modes; hover/focus red+deck-reveal works on rows in both views; the topic tag does not turn red on hover.
npm run build passes; src/data/essays.js is unmodified; the featured pull markup is still byte-identical.

requirement.title: Step-7 review refinements — featured always-visible, filter chrome, filter/view motion
requirement.description: Owner refinements during the step-7 design review (2026-06-10). (1) FEATURED ALWAYS VISIBLE: the featured pull no longer hides while filtering — supersedes the hide-on-filter behavior specified in REQ-003 (the body.is-filtered rule and class toggle are removed). (2) FILTER CHROME: the result line is count-only ("— N essays —") — the inline "Clear" link is removed; the in-field × is the sole clear affordance. The placeholder is "Filter essays" (no surrounding dashes) at 50% opacity, fading to 0 on focus and back to 50% on blur (150ms). (3) FILTER MOTION: filtered rows fade out (150ms opacity) then collapse height/padding (150ms, delayed) so remaining rows reflow up — implemented via a .filtered-out class with staggered transitions (no display:none toggle); collapsed rows leave the a11y/tab order (visibility hidden, delayed past the motion). (4) VIEW MOTION: the Topic↔Date swap is a ~120ms cross-fade dip (fade out active view, swap, fade in). (5) Both motions are instant under prefers-reduced-motion. Also folded in earlier in the review: row-to-row dividers removed; leader dots switched to a radial-gradient with a wide 8px gap.

acceptance.criterion: Featured pull stays visible while filtering in both Topic and Date views.
Result line shows count only ("— N essays —"); no inline Clear link/button exists; the in-field × clears the input and restores all rows.
Placeholder is "Filter essays" (no dashes), 50% opacity at rest, fades to 0 on focus and back to 50% on blur.
A filtered-out row ends at opacity 0, max-height 0, visibility hidden (faded then collapsed); a kept row stays opaque; clearing restores all 23.
Topic↔Date toggle cross-fades (no hard cut); after settle the data-view is swapped, vw-leaving/vw-entering classes are cleaned up, and the shown view is fully opaque.
Under prefers-reduced-motion: reduce, both the filter and the view swap apply instantly (verified at ~80ms).
npm run build passes; essays.js unmodified; featured markup still byte-identical.

test.steps: Load /writing. Count a.essay rows; count .section; read .essay-lead border-style + aria-hidden; grep DOM for section-toggle/aria-expanded/glyph on the sections; confirm featured markup + masthead lines present.
test.expected: 23 rows; 3 sections; leader border-bottom-style=dotted, aria-hidden=true; 0 accordion elements on sections (the aria-expanded/glyph in DOM belong to the site header, identical on /); featured pull + "arranged by what it argues" + "No newsletter to sign up for" present. PASS.

test.steps: Read first deck opacity at rest. Hover row 1: read title color + deck opacity; compare document.scrollHeight before/after. Tab to first a.essay; after settle, read :focus-visible, title color, deck opacity, outline color. Repeat hover in dark mode (data-theme=dark).
test.expected: Rest deck opacity=0. Hover: title rgb(204,0,6), deck opacity=1, scrollHeight 5164→5164 (no reflow). Keyboard focus: matches :focus-visible, title rgb(204,0,6), deck opacity=1, outline rgb(204,0,6). Dark: canvas rgb(18,18,18), hover title rgb(229,38,58), deck revealed. PASS.

test.steps: Type "buffalo" → count visible rows, read #search-hint, read #featured display, check On AI section .no-matches + empty msg. Type "zzzqqq" → count visible + hint. Click #search-clear → count visible + featured display.
test.expected: "buffalo": 1 visible, hint "— 1 essay · Clear —" (no Section/shown), featured display:none, On AI shows empty message. "zzzqqq": 0 visible, hint "— 0 essays · Clear —". Clear: 23 visible, featured display:block. PASS.

test.steps: At 375px load /writing. Read .essay-lead display; compare quarter.top vs title.bottom within a row; check document.scrollingElement.scrollWidth ≤ innerWidth.
test.expected: Leader display:none; quarter sits below title; no horizontal overflow at 375px. PASS.

test.steps: Load /. Hover .case .title and .essay .title; read computed color.
test.expected: Both hover to rgb(204,0,6) signature (light); resolves to the dark signature in dark mode via the token. PASS. (Global a:hover remains tertiary by design — only title hovers were promoted, per PRD scope.)

test.steps: Load /writing. Check controls band order (featured→controls→list), filter out of head. Read toggle default (Topic active+ink+underline, aria-pressed; no red). Click Date: assert topic hidden / date shown, 0 sections, 23 flat rows, first meta "TOPIC · QUARTER" newest-first. Reload → expect Date (localStorage). Filter per view; hover a Date row.
test.expected: Controls between featured and list; filter in controls not head. Topic default active, Date grey, neither red. Date = 23 flat rows, "Experience Design · Q1 2026" first. Persists across reload. Filter scoped to active view (Topic per-section empty, Date single empty). Date hover → title red + deck, tag stays grey. H1 unchanged. 18/18 PASS.

test.steps: Filter "buffalo" (settle 450ms): count visible by !.filtered-out, read result line + featured display, read a filtered-out row's opacity/max-height/visibility. Clear via × → recount. Toggle Date (settle): read data-view, vw-* leftover classes, #view-date opacity. Placeholder: read ::placeholder opacity at rest / focus / blur. Reduced-motion context: filter + toggle, check at 80ms.
test.expected: 1 visible; "— 1 essay —" (no Clear button); featured display:block. filtered-out row opacity 0 / max-height 0px / visibility hidden; kept row opacity 1; clear restores 23. After toggle: data-view=date, no vw-leaving/vw-entering, #view-date opacity 1, topic display:none. Placeholder 0.5 → 0 (focus) → 0.5 (blur). Reduced-motion: 1 visible and view=date already at 80ms. 21/21 PASS (consolidated final suite).
